title: gomphia nitida
intro: Gomphia nitida, also known as the black olive tree, is a plant species in the family Ebenaceae, native to tropical Africa. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Gomphia nitida include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and reduce cholesterol levels. Herbal preparations of Gomphia nitida can be found in the form of infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which are used to treat various health conditions.
